MoneyOwedRecord.title: MoneyOwedRecord
MoneyOwedRecord.description: Represents a record of money owed by the user to others.

id.description: Unique identifier for the money owed record.

owedTo.description: The person or entity to whom the money is owed.

dueDate.description: The date by which the money is due.

notes.description: Additional notes or details about the debt.

MoneyRemainingRecord.title: MoneyRemainingRecord
MoneyRemainingRecord.description: Represents a record of money owed to the user by others.

id.description: Unique identifier for the money remaining record.

amount.description: The amount of money owed to the user.

owedBy.description: The person or entity who owes the money.

dueDate.description: The date by which the money is expected.

notes.description: Additional notes or details about the expected money.

DailyMoneyUseRecord.title: DailyMoneyUseRecord
DailyMoneyUseRecord.description: Represents a record of daily money received or spent by the user.

id.description: Unique identifier for the daily money use record.

date.description: The date of the money use record.

received.description: The amount of money received on that day.

spent.description: The amount of money spent on that day.

purpose.description: The purpose for which the money was spent or received.

notes.description: Additional notes about the daily money usage.

SavingsPlan.title: SavingsPlan
SavingsPlan.description: Represents a stored AI savings plan.

completedTasks.description: Indices of strategy tasks that the user has completed.

User.title: User
User.description: Represents a user of the application.

email.description: The email address of the user.

name.description: The display name of the user.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user.

definition.description: Stores records of money owed by the user.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user.

params.name: moneyOwedRecordId
params.description: The unique identifier of the money owed record.

definition.description: Stores records of money owed to the user.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user.

params.name: moneyRemainingRecordId
params.description: The unique identifier of the money remaining record.

definition.description: Stores records of daily money usage by the user.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user.

params.name: dailyMoneyUseRecordId
params.description: The unique identifier of the daily money use record.

firestore.reasoning: The Firestore structure uses path-based isolation for all user data, including a new subcollection for SavingsPlans to track financial goals and compliance history.
